deltaReason: 6 tests not executed in primary REG-2026-05-14-1420 run; focused re-run on 2026-05-14

results.title: Long-title PDP overflow (179-char title via @td(STRESS.longTitleSlug))

viewport_1920.clippedChildrenNotes: swiper#464 (carousel, intentional), sr-only spans (screen-reader-only utility class), vc-product-title__text on related-product cards (line-clamp, by design), !absolute.!-m-px (visually hidden utility)

results.note: 179-char title wraps to multi-line (90px at 1920, 288px at 375). No horizontal scroll at either viewport. H1 width equals parent width exactly — no overflow. Clipped children are all intentional (swiper carousel, sr-only, related-product title line-clamp). PASS at both viewports.

results.title: Spacing grid on checkout sections on /cart
results.note: All 5 checkout sections present and rendered. Zero off-grid spacing values across paddingTop/Right/Bottom/Left, marginTop/Right/Bottom/Left, gap, rowGap, columnGap. Consistent with SPC-001/002 PASS results from primary run.

results.title: No shift on product-card hover (neighbor stable)
results.note: Hovered card 1, waited 500ms for hover transition to settle. Card 2 (neighbor) maintained exact position: top=375, left=801.5. topDelta=0, leftDelta=0. Hover effect uses outline or transform that does not affect adjacent siblings in grid layout.

results.title: No shift on cart-icon badge update (header neighbor stable)

twoDigitTransition.reason: Cart mutation API debounces/throttles rapid clicks — badge incremented from 2 to 5 across multiple settled mutations within time budget; 2-digit threshold (10) not reached. All observed transitions showed topDelta=0, leftDelta=0.

results.note: account-button position immovable across all badge transitions observed (2→3→4→5). top=6.5 and left=1752.36 unchanged throughout. Badge width held at 24px for counts 2–5 (min-width CSS constraint). 2-digit transition not reached within time budget due to API debounce — partial evidence only for that sub-check; single-digit stability PASS is confirmed.

results.title: Validation error insertion — sibling input stable
results.note: BLOCKED — auth-redirect confirmed. Navigating to /sign-up with authenticated session immediately redirected to /catalog (no form rendered, currentPath=/catalog, hasSignUpForm=false). Playwright MCP operates in a shared persistent session with no incognito/fresh-context API. The blocker predicted by feedback_no_signout_page memory is confirmed. Test cannot be executed without a CDP-isolated unauthenticated context.

results.title: Skeleton → content swap on slow network
results.note: BLOCKED — skeletons NOT observable at normal network speed. /account/orders loaded with readyState=complete and 10 table rows already rendered before evaluation could run. .vc-table__skeleton was absent from DOM entirely. Playwright MCP exposes no CDP Network.emulateNetworkConditions endpoint — Slow 3G throttle cannot be applied. Test design requires network throttle to Slow 3G to capture skeleton state; without it the skeleton-to-content swap is instantaneous and unmeasurable.

LAYOUT-SHIFT-003.observedBehavior: Immediate server-side redirect to /catalog. Navigation completed at /sign-up then resolved to /catalog within the same page.goto() call. No sign-up form elements rendered at any point.
LAYOUT-SHIFT-003.resolution: BLOCKED — requires unauthenticated incognito context not available via Playwright MCP shared session
LAYOUT-SHIFT-003.retestPath: Run via CDP with a fresh browser context (context.newPage() with no storageState) or sign out first via a session-clearing evaluate, then navigate to /sign-up

LAYOUT-SHIFT-004.observedBehavior: Page loaded fully before evaluation window opened. readyState=complete, .vc-table__skeleton absent, 10 tbody rows already rendered. Skeleton classes not present in DOM at any sampled moment.
LAYOUT-SHIFT-004.skeletonCssPresent: Confirmed in compiled CSS per storefront-selectors.md Section 7 — class exists in stylesheet but DOM element is removed once data resolves
LAYOUT-SHIFT-004.resolution: BLOCKED — Playwright MCP cannot apply CDP Network.emulateNetworkConditions (Slow 3G). Skeleton resolves before MCP evaluation can observe it at normal LAN speed.
LAYOUT-SHIFT-004.retestPath: Use Chrome DevTools MCP which exposes Network.emulateNetworkConditions, or Playwright test with context.newPage() + route interception to delay API responses
